schema.name: CiscoUmbrellaZeroTrustAccessFlow_CL
schema.description: The Cisco Secure Access Zero Trust Access (ZTA) flow logs show your organization's traffic through the Secure Access ZTA services.

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The date and time of the ZTA event, expressed as a UTC-formatted string.

columns.name: IdentityEmail
columns.description: The email address of the Active Directory user.

columns.name: IdentityLabels
columns.description: The list of labels for the identity.

columns.name: IdentityTypeLabels
columns.description: The label of the identity type.

columns.name: OrganizationId
columns.description: The Secure Access organization ID.

columns.name: MspOrganizationId
columns.description: The Secure Access organization ID of the parent managed service provider.

columns.name: HostName
columns.description: The hostname of the user device.

columns.name: TransactionId
columns.description: Universally unique identifier (UUID) of the transaction associated with the event.

columns.name: PrivateResourceId
columns.description: The ID that Secure Access assigns to the customer-defined private application.

columns.name: PrivateResourceGroupId
columns.description: The ID if the rule matched is based on the private application group.

columns.name: AppConnectorId
columns.description: The ID of the App Connector.

columns.name: AppConnectorGroupId
columns.description: The group ID of the App Connector.

columns.name: RulesetId
columns.description: The ID of the ruleset.

columns.name: RuleId
columns.description: The ID of the access rule.

columns.name: ConnectionStatus
columns.description: The status of the request to connect to the private resource. Valid values are: Connected, Reset, Terminated, or Unknown.

columns.name: ConnectionFailureReason
columns.description: The error codes for failed connection requests.

columns.name: HeadendType
columns.description: The type of the headend. Valid values are: CLAP or BAP.

columns.name: EventType
columns.description: The type of flow event.

columns.name: RxBytes
columns.description: The number of bytes received during the session.

columns.name: TxBytes
columns.description: The number of bytes transmitted or sent during the session.

columns.name: EgressIp
columns.description: The egress IP address is not included in the flow logs and appears as empty. However, it can be found in the ZTA logs using the same transaction ID.

columns.name: EgressPort
columns.description: The egress port number of the network where the request originated.

columns.name: NtGroupId
columns.description: The tunnel ID associated with this request.

columns.name: ZtaSourcePort
columns.description: The port number used by the Zero Trust proxy service to connect to an unmanaged device requesting a connection to a private resource.

columns.name: EnforcedBy
columns.description: The Secure Access component or service that enforced the policy or control related to this event (e.g., Firewall, Web Proxy).

columns.name: FtdEnforcementId
columns.description: The unique identifier of the enforcement action taken by a Firepower Threat Defense (FTD) device integrated with Secure Access.

columns.name: FtdEnforcementName
columns.description: The name or type of enforcement action taken by a FTD device integrated with Secure Access (e.g., Malware Block, URL Category Block).
